{{CargoRelic
|name=The Goodbye Kiss
|class_id=22146
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=07-18
|source=
|description=On Jul 18, 1935 AD, a photographer took the photo The Goodbye Kiss.<br>The Goodbye Kiss is a military-themed photo taken during World War II. At the time, soldiers were separated from their families to join the battlefield. The photo shows a soldier on the verge of departure, leaning out the window at the train station to kiss his loved one goodbye.
|fame=29
|art=75
|fth=47
|civ=49
|tech=43
|ss1=Snail DEF +30<br>Fungus Farm: +3%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss2=Snail DEF +40<br>Fungus Farm: +4%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss3=Snail DEF +50<br>Fungus Farm: +5%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss4=Snail DEF +70<br>Fungus Farm: +7%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss5=Snail DEF +90<br>Fungus Farm: +9%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss7=Snail DEF +90<br>Fungus Farm: +9%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi<br>Fungus Farm: +7%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: This Relic's ART +10
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, 2x White Card Drops +7.5%
}}
